case_title: CARL OLSON VS. SHELLINA VISRAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLSON, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT VISRAM, SHELLINA INDIVIDUALLY & DBA  DOING BUSINESS AS CHEAP THRILLS CHEAP THRILLS DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLSON, CARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISRAM, SHELLINA INDIVIDUALLY & DBA  DOING BUSINESS AS CHEAP THRILLS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1687 HAIGHT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAST DUE RENT, DAILY DAMAGES, AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $38,916.38. SEE SCANNED DOC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,300.52 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLSON, CARL

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLSON, CARL ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT VISRAM, SHELLINA INDIVIDUALLY & DBA  DOING BUSINESS AS CHEAP THRILLS
